name: Grape Nuts & Grains
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients.
2. Add the ingredients to a large bowl or bread machine pan.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Place in a greased loaf pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool before slicing.
